records.description: Pre-trained deep bidirectional transformers for language understanding. Achieves state-of-the-art on GLUE, SQuAD v1.1 and v2.0 through task-specific fine-tuning from a single shared model.
No Language Left Behind — supports 200 languages including low-resource ones. Uses a novel data-mining strategy and introduces the FLORES-200 evaluation benchmark.
Large multimodal model accepting image and text inputs. Demonstrates human-level performance on professional and academic benchmarks, passing bar exams in the top percentile.
Bootstrapping Language-Image Pre-training with frozen encoders and LLMs. A Q-Former bridges the modality gap with minimal trainable parameters, enabling state-of-the-art zero-shot captioning.
Specialized Llama 2 variant for code synthesis. Supports infilling, zero-shot instruction following, and 100K token context windows for long-form code understanding and completion.
Anchor-free real-time detection with a C2f module for richer gradient flow and a decoupled detection head. Achieves an improved accuracy-speed tradeoff over all prior YOLO variants.
Trained on 680,000 hours of multilingual supervised web audio. Handles transcription and translation for 99 languages with high robustness to accents, background noise, and dialects.
Segment Anything Model 2 — universal promptable segmentation for images and video. A streaming memory architecture enables real-time video segmentation with interactive point, box, or mask prompts.
Extended PEGASUS for long documents via staggered block-local attention and global tokens. Efficiently handles up to 16,000 input tokens, outperforming prior long-range transformers on summarization.
Joint structure prediction for proteins, DNA, RNA, and small molecules. A diffusion module operates directly on raw atom coordinates, replacing the prior residue-level evoformer with a pairformer.
Structure-based drug design via 3D equivariant diffusion on molecular graphs. Generates drug-like ligands conditioned on protein pocket geometry without needing predefined molecular scaffolds.
Improved visual instruction tuning with higher resolution support (up to 4× tiles). Uses a CLIP ViT-L encoder and Vicuna language decoder connected via an MLP projection layer.
Unified text-to-audio, music, and speech framework in a shared latent space. Uses AudioMAE and a language model for sequential audio representation prior to latent diffusion generation.
Pretrained probabilistic forecasting via a language model framework with tokenized real-valued series. Trained on large corpora of real and synthetic data; zero-shot competitive on unseen datasets.
Locally aware patch features from a pretrained WideResNet stored in a coreset-reduced memory bank. At inference, anomaly scores are computed as distance to nearest nominal patch.
